<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please fill in the sections below. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / tooling / CI
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Breaking change

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run test` pass locally.
- [ ] `npm run build` and `npm run build-storybook` succeed.
- [ ] Added or updated unit tests for the change.
- [ ] Added or updated a Storybook story where relevant.
- [ ] Components remain presentational (no backend, agent framework, or state library).
- [ ] Accessibility preserved: semantic HTML, keyboard support, status not by color alone.
- [ ] Works in both light and dark themes.
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, docs, or API reference) if the public API changed.
- [ ] No breaking API changes, or they are documented in the changelog and PR description.

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, include before/after in light and dark where helpful. -->
